name: ManageEngine Endpoint Central
description: Monitor device compliance, patch management status, and managed endpoint inventory in ManageEngine Endpoint Central Cloud (UEM)

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Checks health and patch compliance status of all devices managed by Endpoint Central. Devices are rated Healthy, Vulnerable, or Highly Vulnerable based on missing patches.

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Lists all devices under Endpoint Central management (Scope of Management) with agent installation status, OS info, and network details.

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Monitors missing patches across managed devices, highlighting critical and important severity patches that need deployment.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists users with active sessions on managed devices, providing evidence of who has access to endpoints managed by Endpoint Central.
